items.title: Tarot Interviews Comes To Bearded Theory
items.summary: I’ll be visiting Bearded Theory with the Tarot Interviews team to capture vox pops, one-card conversations and quick chats with artists, festivalgoers and curious passers-by. One tarot card, one question. Across the weekend, I’ll be roaming the festival site with a deck, a microphone and a…
items.content_html:
I’ll be visiting Bearded Theory with the Tarot Interviews team to capture vox pops, one-card conversations and quick chats with artists, festivalgoers and curious passers-by.

One tarot card, one question.

Across the weekend, I’ll be roaming the festival site with a deck, a microphone and a camera, inviting people to share something inspired by their card.

I’m especially interested in those moments that stay with people long after the weekend ends: muddy boots, a smile left from the compliment of a friendly stranger, the feeling that your bones are still vibrating at the same frequency of Garbage's opening number.

If you see me at Bearded Theory and fancy taking part, come and say hello! Look for the man in the bowler hat with a tarot card in the brim.
